APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF; THERE IS NO APPEARANCE THIS DAY BY OR FOR DEFENDANT MOHAMMED A. ISMAIL; IN OPEN COURT AND ON THE RECORD, COURT ORDERS JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF AND AGAINST DEFENDANT MOHAMMED A. ISMAIL IN THE SUM OF $725.75 PRINCIPAL; $109.14 INTEREST; $181.43 ATTORNEY FEES; AND $144.00 COSTS FOR A TOTAL JUDGMENT OF $1,160.32; COURT INFORMS COUNSEL DUCOTE COPY OF JUDGMENT TO BE MAILED.
